Market Landscape

The Crisis by the Numbers

70,000+

Hospitals in India

3,000+

Blood Banks

Millions

Emergency Cases Annually

CRITICAL GAP

Despite massive infrastructure, there is no centralized real-time system connecting these nodes.

Critical Failure Point

The "Visibility Gap"

Doctors and families face frequent blood & oxygen shortages, often unaware that resources exist just a few kilometers away.

20–30 Minutes

Average delay in critical moments due to manual search and phone calls.

Time = Life

Delays are preventable.
